value: Order system migrated to unified component architecture in web/lib/order/. 8 reusable components: OrderPriceStrip (BID/MID/ASK/SPREAD), OrderLegPills (colored +/− direction), OrderConfirmSummary (total cost, max gain/loss), OrderPriceButtons, OrderActionToggle, OrderTifSelector, OrderQuantityInput, OrderPriceInput. 2 hooks: useOrderPrices, useOrderValidation. All 6 order entry locations now use these components: OrderTab (New/Combo), ChainBuilder, BookTab, InstrumentModal, ModifyModal. OrderConfirmSummary shows spread max gain/loss calculations (debit: maxLoss=premium, maxGain=width-premium; credit: inverse). Price values now shown in BID/MID/ASK buttons everywhere.
